titles.title: Fostering the Use of Technology to Uphold Regulatory Effectiveness in Supervision Act
Fostering the Use of Technology to Uphold Regulatory Effectiveness in Supervision Act
To require certain supervisory agencies to assess their technological capabilities, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Financial Services.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 52 - 0.
